config.title: Pit 5L - strona 3 #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
<% 'funkcje pomocne przy ukladaniu napisów - do deklaracji #include "50514"
%>

body.p:
WTPFXY(43A,StretchDoKratki(root_.pt5l_strNIP1),PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC)
WTPFXY(44A,StretchDoKratki(left(replace(root_.pt5l_strRegon1," ",""),5)),PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(44B,StretchDoKratki(mid(replace(root_.pt5l_strRegon1," ",""),6,5)),PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(44C,StretchDoKratki(mid(replace(root_.pt5l_strRegon1," ",""),11,4)),PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC)
WTPFXY(45,root_.pt5l_strNazwa1,PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC)
WTPFXY(46,root_.pt5l_strMiejsce1,PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC)
PT5L_KWOTA(47,root_.pt5l_curUdzial1) PT5L_KWOTA(48,root_.pt5l_curPrzychod1) PT5L_KWOTA(49,root_.pt5l_curKoszty1) PT5L_KWOTA(50,root_.pt5l_curDochod1) PT5L_KWOTA(51,root_.pt5l_curStrata1)
WTPFXY(52A,StretchDoKratki(root_.pt5l_strNIP2),PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(53A,StretchDoKratki(left(replace(root_.pt5l_strRegon2," ",""),5)),PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(53B,StretchDoKratki(mid(replace(root_.pt5l_strRegon2," ",""),6,5)),PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(53C,StretchDoKratki(mid(replace(root_.pt5l_strRegon2," ",""),11,4)),PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(54,root_.pt5l_strNazwa2,PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(55,root_.pt5l_strMiejsce2,PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC)
PT5L_KWOTA(56,root_.pt5l_curUdzial2) PT5L_KWOTA(57,root_.pt5l_curPrzychod2) PT5L_KWOTA(58,root_.pt5l_curKoszty2) PT5L_KWOTA(59,root_.pt5l_curDochod2) PT5L_KWOTA(60,root_.pt5l_curStrata2)
WTPFXY(61A,StretchDoKratki(root_.pt5l_strNIP3),PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(62A,StretchDoKratki(left(replace(root_.pt5l_strRegon3," ",""),5)),PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(62B,StretchDoKratki(mid(replace(root_.pt5l_strRegon3," ",""),6,5)),PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(62C,StretchDoKratki(mid(replace(root_.pt5l_strRegon3," ",""),11,4)),PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(63,root_.pt5l_strNazwa3,PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(64,root_.pt5l_strMiejsce3,PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC)
PT5L_KWOTA(65,root_.pt5l_curUdzial3) PT5L_KWOTA(66,root_.pt5l_curPrzychod3) PT5L_KWOTA(67,root_.pt5l_curKoszty3) PT5L_KWOTA(68,root_.pt5l_curDochod3) PT5L_KWOTA(69,root_.pt5l_curStrata3)
WTPFXY(70A,StretchDoKratki(root_.pt5l_strNIP4),PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(71A,StretchDoKratki(left(replace(root_.pt5l_strRegon4," ",""),5)),PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(71B,StretchDoKratki(mid(replace(root_.pt5l_strRegon4," ",""),6,5)),PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(71C,StretchDoKratki(mid(replace(root_.pt5l_strRegon4," ",""),11,4)),PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(72,root_.pt5l_strNazwa4,PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(73,root_.pt5l_strMiejsce4,PT5L_FONT_WYSOKOSC)
PT5L_KWOTA(74,root_.pt5l_curUdzial4) PT5L_KWOTA(75,root_.pt5l_curPrzychod4) PT5L_KWOTA(76,root_.pt5l_curKoszty4) PT5L_KWOTA(77,root_.pt5l_curDochod4) PT5L_KWOTA(78,root_.pt5l_curStrata4)
PT5L_LICZBA(79,root_.pt5l_nLZalPit5A) PT5L_LICZBA(80,root_.pt5l_nLZalPit5X) PT5L_LICZBA(81,root_.pt5l_nLZalRemanent)
DEMO_MARKER(4000,11000)
